---
title: "Conway Mordaunt Shipley"
---

## Conway Mordaunt Shipley

**Dates:** (1824-1888)

### Description

son of the Rev. Charles Shipley

### Biography

He and his sister Anna Maria were described by CMY as ‘the first friends I had besides my cousins’  [LG 1906, see Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 73]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
